comments.body: Investigation: The eval-daily.yml workflow correctly passes ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from GitHub secrets (line 55). All eval failures show 'Missing ANTHROPIC_API_KEY' which means the secret is not configured in the GitHub repository settings. This is a CI infrastructure issue — no code change needed. The ANTHROPIC_API_KEY secret must be added to the repo's Settings > Secrets and Variables > Actions.
comments.author: Main
